post-merge-review-flag.description: New --post-merge flag on the review skill. When set, review scopes against the merge commit diff (main~1..main for the set's merge commit) rather than the worktree branch diff. Does not require or modify set status.

merge-review-suggestion.description: After successful merge, the merge skill suggests 'Run /rapid:review <set-id> --post-merge for post-merge review' as an optional next action.

canonical-status-literals.signature: Correct past-tense status names for review skill precondition checks
canonical-status-literals.description: review/SKILL.md needs to reference correct status values (complete, not reviewing) for its precondition gate. Set 1 establishes which status values are canonical.

no-status-mutation.description: The --post-merge review path must NOT call `state transition set`. It operates on already-merged sets and produces review artifacts without changing set status.

scoping-correctness.description: Post-merge review must scope changed files from the set's merge commit, not from a worktree branch (which no longer exists after merge). Uses git diff against the merge commit.
